meanings.definition: descent of the uterus into the pelvic cavity that occurs late in pregnancy; the fetus is said to have dropped

examples: the conversation lightened me up a bit

meanings.definition: reduce the weight on; make lighter
examples: she lightened the load on the tired donkey
after a glass of wine, he lightened up a bit
The paint will brighten the room

meanings.definition: alleviate or remove (pressure or stress) or make less oppressive
examples: relieve the pressure and the stress
lighten the burden of caring for her elderly parents
